titleStmt.title: SII 28.99: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 99. (A.R. No. 254 of 1913.) VAYIRAPURAM, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records the gift of 90 sheep for a perpetual lamp for God Tirunandīśvaram-uḍaiyār of nagaram Vayiramēghapuram alias Jaṉanāthapuram in Tirunalūr-nāḍu in Ōymā-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam by ••• vaḍukaṉ, probably a trader, residing in the Mummuḍi-chōḻa-pperunteru in the said nagaram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara virunilamaṭantaiyum porccayappāvaiyuñ
cirttaṉic celviyuttaṉ perunteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭitiyaṉūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭun tuṭarvaṉavelip
paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻ matiṭ koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum poruka
ṭaliḻattaraicar tamuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻiṉ muṭiyumuṉṉaṟavar pakkaṟṟeṉṉavar vaiytta cuntaramuṭiyu
m Ittiraṉāmun taiṇṭirai yiḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟpaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya pa
lar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceruvil ciṉavilirupattoru kālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mel varucāttimattivvaraṇ karutiyiruttiya
cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻi mika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ ṉaḷapperum pukaḻḻoṭum piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭi
Eḻaraiyilakkamum navatetikkulap perumalaikaḷu māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa [śrī]rājentracoḻa tevarkku
yāṇṭu Onpatāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Oymānāṭṭuttirunalūr nāṭṭu nakaram vayiramekapuramāṉa jaṉanātapurattu
mumuṭi coḻapperunteru vaṭukaneṉ Iṉṉakarattu tirunantiśvaramuṭaiyārkku vaiytta tiru
nantā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku vi muvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ittanmam rakṣippān pātam Eṉ talai melliṉa Aṟamaṟavaṟkka .
Digital edition of SII 28.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
